reviews.review_description: How do I refund?  It was just a dummy screen that didn't do anything.

App works great on the quest 3, but you need to do a room scan and then PLACE WINDOWS through ADD FURNITURE. Then in the app you can CLICK on the area you placed your WINDOWS. The app then shows the surrounding scene where you placed windows AND clicked on them! (ceiling also works)

For maximum immersion just place a window covering each entire wall. This way you can walk around your room and see things inside but replace the outside with a cool environment that you can see through your walls!

There aren't many environments and you can basically only use the browser, or the meta browser over the app. So it's not super useful but it shows something cool mixed reality with spatial information about a room can do. In my opinion something like this should be the way to implement MR environments as a background for all kind of things, in addition to basic pass through.
